text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My days of training with the chronically cynical
Nice Nature have begun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While not possessing any exceptional talents, she
has the ability to keep up with the likes of
powerful runners such as Mayano Top Gun and
Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's also true that she cannot seem to reach
the top, and that weighs on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she continues to work toward her dream of
becoming a superstar.
